codex-math.name: codex-math
codex-math.description: Use OpenAI Codex (gpt-5.5) for mathematical proof verification, proof writing, derivation checking, and conjecture exploration. Codex is excellent at math but produces a substantial fraction of false positives (historically ~50% on gpt-5.4; not recalibrated for gpt-5.5) — always triage results before acting.
